sb_prompt: WHAT KIND OF CAR DO YOU THINK YOU MIGHT BUY NEXT?  WHAT SORTS OF THINGS WILL ENTER INTO YOUR DECISION?  SEE IF YOUR REQUIREMENTS AND THE OTHER CALLER'S REQUIREMENTS ARE SIMILAR.
raw_output:
Participants: Particiant A (PA) and Participatnent B (PB)

Log:

PA: Hello there! How are you doing today?
PB: I'm doing pretty well, thank you for asking. And yourself?
PA : Im doing good aswell , thanks . So what brings you to call ?
Pb : Well, I was hoping to discuss something that might be of interest to us both - cars. What kind of car do you think you might buy next?

 PA : Oh interesting ! You got me thinking now ..Well i am looking into getting a new car soon, so its defintely on my mind right now. But im torn between going electric or sticking to gasoline version .
P B : Yeah, it can be tough decision to make. For me, I haven’t really made up my mind yet either way. It just depends on my budget and needs at the time. Right now though, I’m leaning towards an SUV because of the extra space for my family.
PA ; Hmm , yeah its true more space would come handy for sure .But lately ,I been reading alot about Tesla Model s Plaid ,its insane acceleration & range capability seems quite intriguing. But also worried abt charging infrastructure availability where I live.
P
